DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NEAL MARGULIS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF CHLOE BALZERS DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND THEIR ATTORNEY OF RECORD. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS MOOT GIVEN THE SERVICE OF VERIFIED RESPONSES. IF THERE ARE ANY DEFICIENCIES IN THE RESPONSES, DEFENDANTS MAY FILE ANOTHER MOTION AFTER MEETING AND CONFERRING. SANCTIONS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Neal Margulis, An Individual: And Digital Display Innovations, Llc; A California Limited Liability Company
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CHLOE BALZER's Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Neal Margulis, An Individual: And Digital Display Innovations, Llc; A California Limited Liability Company.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of plaintiff Chloe Balzer for punitive damages discovery against defendants Neal Margulis and Digital Display Innovations LLC is denied without prejudice.

Civil Code 3295(c) regulates punitive damages discovery. It states that the court may order such discovery if "the plaintiff has established that there is a substantial probability that the plaintiff will prevail on the claim pursuant to Section 3294." This is an evidentiary showing that must be based on "supporting and opposing affidavits" or other factual showing. Plaintiff supports her request with an attorney declaration that does not show personal knowledge, and with attachments containing hearsay. On its face plaintiff's showing does not establish that she will prevail on the claim pursuant to Section 3294. Accordingly, the court denies her request without prejudice.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, with a cover letter reflecting compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Continued To Mar-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Chloe Balzers Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Their Attorney Of Record
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NEAL MARGULIS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Chloe Balzers Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Their Attorney Of Record

The motion is moot given the service of verified responses. If there are any deficiencies in the responses, Defendants may file another motion after meeting and conferring. Sanctions denied.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
